headline: Salesforce (CRM) Announces Major Expansion of Agent Fabric Multi-Vendor AI Control Plane
summary: Salesforce Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the cheap AI stocks to buy according to analysts. Earlier on April 15, Salesforce announced a major expansion of Agent Fabric, its multi-vendor AI control plane designed to help enterprises manage, govern, and orchestrate networks of autonomous agents. headline: Bridgewater Associates Is Trading the Software Apocalypse as It Sells Workday, Salesforce, Other Key SaaS Stocks
